scene_input.scene_summary: Abū Lahab confronts al-Mughīrah about the Quraysh's defeat.
scene_input.key_visual_action: Abū Lahab pointing accusingly at al-Mughīrah

schema_output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, p. 150
schema_output.moral_lesson: The consequences of pride and arrogance

characters.name: Abū Lahab
characters.appearance: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing black thobe with a distinctive deep red woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a black turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades, hand extended in a accusatory gesture

characters.name: al-Mughīrah
characters.appearance: slender build, slightly stooped shoulders, wearing a dark brown thobe and plain beige woolen cloak with a white cloth head covering, standing with a calm expression

schema_output.narrative_text: Abū Lahab was furious about the Quraysh's defeat. He confronted al-Mughīrah, accusing him of being responsible.
schema_output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor storybook illustration, soft warm hand-painted style for ages 6-12. Exterior of the Zamzam well in 7th century Makkah, with unpainted mud-brick walls in warm earth tones and a packed-earth floor partly covered by a woven palm-fiber mat. Late afternoon golden sunlight casts warm rays across the scene. In the center, the Zamzam well stands tall, its stone walls bearing intricate ancient carvings. Two figures stand facing each other near the well. On the left, the man in the deep red woolen cloak seen entirely from behind: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing black thobe and a black turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades, hand extended in a accusatory gesture towards the figure on the right. On the right, a slender older man with slightly stooped shoulders, wearing a dark brown thobe and plain beige woolen cloak with a white cloth head covering, standing with a calm expression, one hand placed on his hip. Soft warm golden light, tense and confrontational mood. Medium shot from slightly above. Earthy tones, beige, and deep red palette with the deep red cloak as a color anchor. No modern objects, historically accurate 7th century scene.
